creator: @frankie_pfw
caption: @menufit.app low calorie high protein fast food options! Whataburger Original: Whatachicken Sandwich (540 cal 29g) fries (420 cal 5g), coke (390 cal). Total: (1350 cal 34g protein) Low Calorie: Grilled Chicken sandwich, on a small bun, easy mayo instead of whatasauce (325 cal 30g protein), small fries (280 cal 3g), coke zero (0 cal). (Total: 605 cal 33g protein) High Protein: 2x Grilled Chicken sandwich, on a small bun, with buffalo sauce instead of whatasauce, with 2 extra grilled filets (total of three), with jack cheese (630 cal 82g protein x2 = 1260 cal 164g protein) Shake Shack Original: Single Shack Burger (500 cal 29g) fries (470 cal 6g) coke (210 cal). (total: 1180 cal 35g) Low Calorie: Single Shack Burger on a gluten free bun with mustard instead of the shack sauce (400 cal 25g) Vanilla Frozen Custard (280 cal 7g) coke zero (0 cal). (Total: 680 cal 32g) High Protein: Triple Shack Burger with only 1 slice of cheese, and mustard instead of shack sauce (830 cal 66g protein)
ocr_summary: WHATABURGER - Original: 1350 Cal 34g Protein, Low Calorie: 605 Cal 33g Protein, High Protein: 1260 Cal 164g Protein. SHAKE SHACK - Original: 1180 Cal 35g Protein, Low Calorie: 680 Cal 32g Protein, High Protein: 830 Cal 66g Protein. MenuFit app promotion.
visual_scenes: Three men standing in front of graphic displays showing Whataburger and Shake Shack nutritional comparisons. MenuFit app demo at end showing Chick-fil-A Grilled Protein Trio.

swaps.swap_meal: Grilled Chicken Sandwich (small bun, easy mayo) + Small Fries + Coke Zero
2x Grilled Chicken Sandwich (small bun, buffalo sauce, 2 extra filets, jack cheese)
Single Shack Burger (GF bun, mustard) + Vanilla Frozen Custard + Coke Zero
Triple Shack Burger (1 slice cheese, mustard instead of shack sauce)
